title: Two CSE faculty elected to the American Academy of Arts and Sciences
summary_en: The American Academy of Arts and Sciences has elected University of Minnesota Twin Cities College of Science and Engineering Dean Andrew G. Alleyne and Professor Marc Hillmyer as members, recognizing their significant contributions to engineering, research and academic leadership.
